underlying_goal: Execute Phase 57 (telemetry baseline), collect signals, and identify/address gaps in the work and process
friction_detail: Orchestrator skipped log sensor, didn't clean worktrees, missed uncommitted plan files, and Phase 57 implementation narrowed scope dropping the active measurement vision from CONTEXT.md.
brief_summary: User wanted to execute Phase 57 and collect signals; execution succeeded technically but revealed multiple process gaps and a fundamental scope drift where the harness measurement vision was lost in translation to requirements.
